hero.title: Let's Secure Your Operation.
hero.subtitle: Speak directly with security specialists. Fast response. Clear answers. Real execution.

intro.text1: Whether you need immediate support or are planning a long-term security strategy, our team is ready to act.
intro.text2: Tell us what you need. We'll assess, respond, and deploy.

form.title: Request Information or a Quote
form.description: Share your requirements and one of our specialists will contact you shortly.
form.success: Your request has been sent successfully. We'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

directContact.title: 24/7 Operations & Support
directContact.subtitle: Our teams operate around the clock to support critical operations.

coverage.title: Regional Coverage. Centralized Response.
coverage.text: We operate across Mexico, Central America, Brazil, and partner regions through coordinated teams and monitoring centers.

nextSteps.title: What Happens After You Contact Us

step1.title: Review
step1.text: We assess your request and operational context.

step2.title: Contact
step2.text: A specialist reaches out to clarify details.

step3.title: Proposal
step3.text: We deliver a clear, actionable solution.

finalCta.title: Start the Conversation Today
finalCta.subtitle: Secure decisions start with the right partner.
